pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh where APP_DIR is defined and the project files are created.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and README.md which instruct the user to deploy this specific WAF image, and verified against Docker Hub API.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh docker-compose configuration and README.md instructions which expose the application/WAF on port 8080.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves securing a synthetic HR dashboard application generated at /home/ga/legacy-app. The vulnerable application is initially exposed on port 8080. The agent must deploy the owasp/modsecurity-crs:3-nginx image as a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to proxy and filter traffic on port 8080 while removing direct external access to the application container.
